Footer.tagline: The CRM for independent audiovisual production companies. Built for LATAM.
Footer.love: Made with ♥ for LATAM production companies

Home.heroHeadline: The CRM for audiovisual production companies.
Home.heroTagline: The only CRM you can connect to Claude.ai and operate from chat.
Home.heroSub: Manage clients, projects, crew, gear, and invoicing from one place. With a built-in AI assistant via MCP.
Home.socialLabel: Used by production companies in Argentina, Mexico and Chile
Home.problemHeadline: Still using Excel and WhatsApp to run your production company?
Home.problemSub: 78% of independent production companies in LATAM manage their operations with tools that weren't built for this.

problems.title: Clients scattered across spreadsheets
problems.desc: Contacts in spreadsheets, emails without follow-up, opportunities lost because nobody remembers the next step.

problems.title: Projects coordinated over WhatsApp
problems.desc: No visibility into real project status, no accessible history, always depending on a chat group.

problems.title: Crew chaos at payroll time
problems.desc: Searching for each technician's tax ID at payment time, duplicating data across projects, errors in contracts.

Home.featuresHeadline: Everything you need, in one place.
Home.featuresSub: Klapr integrates the tools your production company needs — without the ones it doesn't.

features.title: Client CRM
features.desc: Full client profiles with type, industry, multiple contacts, tax info, tags, and social links. Fully searchable.

features.title: Kanban Pipeline
features.desc: Drag-and-drop job board with 7 stages from lead to invoiced. Supports 7 audiovisual job types.

features.title: Schedule & Follow-ups
features.desc: Log calls, WhatsApp, emails, meetings, and tasks per client or job. With reminders so nothing slips.

features.title: Gear Inventory
features.desc: Full equipment inventory with serial numbers, 8 categories (camera, drone, lighting…). USD value and warranty.

features.title: Suppliers & Crew
features.desc: Database with 20+ specialties. Daily rate in USD or ARS, 1–5 rating, availability, and job history.

features.title: Import Clients with AI
features.desc: Paste a list of client names. Claude automatically enriches each with industry, website, Instagram, and contact role.

features.title: AFIP Electronic Invoicing
features.desc: Issue real invoices via ARCA WSFE. Supports Monotributo and Responsable Inscripto. Linked to jobs.

features.title: PDF Quotes
features.desc: Build quotes with categorized line items (crew, gear, post). Multi-currency USD/ARS, downloadable PDF.

features.title: AI Assistant via MCP
features.desc: Add KLAPR as a Custom Connector in Claude.ai and operate your business from chat. OAuth 2.1 included.

mcpSection.headline: Operate KLAPR from Claude.ai without leaving chat.
mcpSection.sub: KLAPR implements the Model Context Protocol (MCP) with OAuth 2.1. Add it as a Custom Connector in Claude.ai or Claude Desktop and control your business with natural language.
bullets: Create and edit clients, jobs, suppliers, and follow-ups
Assign crew to jobs with role, rate, and service date
Generate liability insurance emails automatically
List tax documents and organization records
OAuth 2.1 login — no token copying, no API keys
mcpSection.examplePrompt: Create a new client called Cervecería Patagonia, it's a brand in the beverages industry. Then create a job 'Corporate Video 2026' assigned to that client with status proposal sent.
mcpSection.exampleResponse:
✓ Client created: Cervecería Patagonia (Brand · Beverages)
✓ Job created: Corporate Video 2026 → Proposal sent

afipSection.headline: AFIP electronic invoicing from day one.
afipSection.sub: Klapr connects directly to ARCA WSFE with your production certificate. Issue real invoices — not simulated, not manual PDFs — without leaving the app.
bullets: Invoice types B and C (Monotributo) and A and B (Responsable Inscripto)
Configurable point of sale per organization
Invoice linked to the corresponding job
Downloadable invoice PDF with your organization's branding
afipSection.note: Requires a production AFIP certificate (the same one you use for your AFIP declarations).

Pricing.headline: Pricing that scales with your production company.
Pricing.sub: Start free. No credit card. Grow when you're ready.
Pricing.ctaHeadline: Not sure which plan to choose?
Pricing.ctaSub: Start with Starter for free and upgrade when you need to. No friction, no data loss.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.desc: To start organizing your production company at no cost.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.desc: For production companies that want to professionalize.

tiers.name: Studio
tiers.desc: For studios and large production teams.

faq.q: Can I start free without a credit card?
faq.a: Yes. The Starter plan is 100% free and doesn't require any payment method. You can use it for as long as you want.

faq.q: Does Klapr support Argentine pesos and US dollars?
faq.a: Yes. Quotes, crew rates, and gear costs can be in ARS or USD. AFIP invoices are issued in ARS.

faq.q: What do I need for AFIP electronic invoicing?
faq.a: You need to upload your AFIP production certificate from your organization settings. The process is done on the AFIP (ARCA) website. Once uploaded, you can issue real invoices right away.

faq.q: What is the AI Assistant via MCP?
faq.a: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is an open standard that lets Claude.ai connect to apps like Klapr. Add Klapr as a Custom Connector in Claude.ai, log in with OAuth, and you can create clients, jobs, and more from chat.

faq.q: Can I export my crew data for contracts?
faq.a: Yes. In all plans you can export your crew database to Excel including Argentine legal fields like DNI, CUIL, and birthdate — ready for contracts and payroll.

faq.q: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
faq.a: Your account automatically reverts to the Starter plan. You don't lose any data — some advanced features just become inaccessible until you renew.

faq.q: Is there a discount for large teams or agencies?
faq.a: Yes. Contact us at hola@klapr.io for a custom plan if you manage more than 3 production companies or have a large team.

Features.headerSub: Every module was designed with the real workflow of an independent production company in LATAM in mind.
Features.ctaSub: No credit card. No time limit on the Starter plan.

modules.title: Client CRM
modules.headline: All your clients, in one place.
modules.problem: Your clients are scattered across WhatsApp, a spreadsheet, and your memory. When someone from the team needs the contact for 'that brand from last year', nobody knows where to look.
modules.desc: Klapr centralizes every client, agency, and brand in one searchable database. Each record has client type (brand / agency / foundation / industry), industry, multiple contacts, full tax info (tax ID, VAT status, address), website, Instagram, LinkedIn, and tags.
bullets: Client type: brand, agency, foundation, industry, tourism
Full tax info: tax ID, VAT status, address
Multiple contacts per client with role and contact methods

modules.title: Kanban Job Pipeline
modules.headline: Your production pipeline, always clear.
modules.problem: You're managing five productions at once and tracking status over WhatsApp threads. Things fall through the cracks and nobody knows what's blocked.
modules.desc: Each job lives on a Kanban board with drag-and-drop cards you can move through 7 stages: Lead → Proposal Sent → Confirmed → In Production → Post Production → Delivered → Invoiced. Supports 7 audiovisual job types: TV spot, event coverage, documentary, advertising, social media, photography, and more.
bullets: 7 stages: lead → proposal sent → confirmed → in production → post → delivered → invoiced
7 job types: TV spot, event coverage, documentary, advertising, social media, photography
One card per job with client, budget, dates, and crew

modules.title: Schedule & Follow-ups
modules.headline: No follow-up slips through the cracks.
modules.problem: Follow-ups get forgotten. That client you quoted three weeks ago never heard back from you because the reminder was a sticky note that fell off your monitor.
modules.desc: Log every interaction — calls, emails, WhatsApp, meetings, proposals, reviews, notes, and tasks — with a reminder date. See your week at a glance and know exactly who needs attention today.
bullets: 8 activity types: call, email, WhatsApp, meeting, proposal, review, note, task
Configurable reminder date per follow-up
View by client or job, with pending filter

modules.title: Gear Inventory
modules.headline: Your technical inventory, always up to date.
modules.problem: How many times did you look for a camera's serial number for insurance and couldn't find it? Or didn't know if a piece of gear was available or in repair?
modules.desc: Full inventory of your technical equipment. Each item has brand, model, serial number, category, operational status, replacement value in USD, purchase date, and warranty expiry. Perfect for insurance policies and knowing what gear you can offer or rent.
bullets: 8 categories: camera, lens, drone, lighting, audio, grip, monitor, stabilizer
Status: operational, in repair, retired
USD replacement value — exportable for insurance

modules.title: Suppliers & Crew
modules.headline: Your crew and supplier network, organized.
modules.problem: Every production you rebuild your crew database from scratch — scrolling through phone contacts and old WhatsApp threads to find the DP you used eight months ago.
modules.desc: Complete database of suppliers and freelancers with 20+ audiovisual specialties: DP, camera operator, production designer, makeup artist, sound engineer, colorist, drone operator, and more. Daily rate in USD or ARS, availability, 1–5 rating, and shared job history.
bullets: 20+ specialties: DP, cam op, art director, sound, color, drone op, gaffer, and more
Daily rate in USD or ARS with job history
1–5 rating and updatable availability

modules.title: Import Clients with AI
modules.headline: From a list of names to a full database in seconds.
modules.problem: You have a spreadsheet with 40 brand and agency names you've worked with, but nothing else — no industry, no website, no contact. Filling it in manually takes hours.
modules.desc: Paste a list of client names (plain text, imported from Excel, or copied from anywhere). Claude analyzes each name and automatically enriches the company's industry, website, Instagram, and likely contact role. You review, confirm or edit, and create all clients at once.
bullets: Paste free text — Klapr detects names automatically
Claude enriches: industry, website, Instagram, contact role
Review and confirm before creating — full control

mockLabels.pasteContent:
Nike Argentina
Renault Argentina
Telecom Personal

modules.title: AFIP Electronic Invoicing
modules.headline: Real invoices without leaving Klapr.
modules.problem: Issuing an electronic invoice requires logging into the AFIP website, finding the WSFE service, entering data manually, and downloading the PDF. In production you do this 20 times a month.
modules.desc: Klapr connects to ARCA WSFE with your AFIP production certificate and issues real electronic invoices directly from the app. Supports Monotributo (type C) and Responsable Inscripto (types A and B). The invoice is linked to the corresponding job with its CAE number and downloadable PDF.
bullets: Direct connection to ARCA WSFE with production certificate
Type C (Monotributo) and A/B (Responsable Inscripto)
Configurable point of sale per organization
Invoice linked to job — full billing history

modules.title: PDF Quotes
modules.headline: Professional quotes, in minutes.
modules.problem: Building a quote in Excel, formatting it, exporting to PDF, and sending by email takes an hour. When the client asks for changes, you start over.
modules.desc: Build complete quotes with categorized line items: production, crew, gear, and post. Sequential numbering per organization, multi-currency (USD or ARS), approval states (draft / sent / approved / rejected), and downloadable PDF with your organization's branding.
bullets: Categorized line items: production, crew, gear, post
Multi-currency: USD or ARS per quote
States: draft → sent → approved → converted to job

modules.title: AI Assistant via MCP
modules.headline: KLAPR in your Claude chat. Without switching tabs.
modules.problem: You have Claude open to draft content and Klapr open to operate. What if you could do everything from chat, without switching tabs?
modules.desc: KLAPR implements the Model Context Protocol (MCP) with OAuth 2.1. Add it as a Custom Connector in Claude.ai or Claude Desktop and operate your business from chat: create clients, set up jobs, assign crew, generate insurance emails, query invoices. All with your login, no token pasting.
bullets: Create and edit clients, jobs, suppliers, follow-ups
Assign crew to jobs with role, rate, and date
Generate liability insurance emails
Query invoices and organization documents
OAuth 2.1 — log in once, everything stays connected

Signup.redirecting: You'll be redirected in a moment.

Wizard.title: Getting started with Klapr
Wizard.sub: Complete these steps and in under 15 minutes your production company is organized.

steps.title: Create your organization
steps.desc: Fill in your name, upload your logo, choose your brand color, and add your tax info. This appears on your quotes and invoices.

steps.title: Add your first client
steps.desc: Create it manually with a full profile, or paste a list of names and let Claude automatically enrich them with industry, website, and Instagram.

steps.title: Log your gear
steps.desc: Add your cameras, drones, lights, and other equipment. With serial numbers and USD values, your inventory is ready for insurance and exports.

steps.title: Add suppliers and crew
steps.desc: Add the freelancers and rental houses you use regularly. With specialty, rate, and availability — ready to assign to any job.

steps.title: Create your first job
steps.desc: Open a job in the pipeline, assign it to a client, and set the right stage. From here you can move cards as production progresses.

steps.title: Issue your first quote
steps.desc: Build a quote with crew, gear, and post line items. Download the PDF and send it to the client. When approved, convert it directly to a confirmed job.

steps.title: Connect Claude as your assistant
steps.desc: Add Klapr as a Custom Connector in Claude.ai or Claude Desktop. Once connected, create clients, jobs, and more from chat with natural language.
